Address.description: Target address configuration in the address pool

Geo.description: Geographic location of the address, returned only in queries

RectifiedGeos.description: List of geographic route codes to be corrected

description: GTM address pool resource, belongs to a GTM instance and is used to carry the target address set and routing capacity configuration

AddrType.description: Target address type of the address pool. If you do not set this parameter, Cloud Scheduling GTM will automatically determine the target address type. ipv4: IPv4 address. ipv6: IPv6 address. cname: Domain name

Addresses.description: List of target addresses in the address pool

CapacityMode.description: Capacity mode, indicates whether to configure address pool capacity or address capacity

Deletable.description: Whether the address pool can be deleted. true: The address pool is not referenced by any routing rule and can be deleted. false: The address pool is referenced by one or more routing rules and cannot be deleted

GtmId.description: UUID of the associated GTM instance

Name.description: Address pool name. UTF-8 format. Maximum length is 64 UTF-8 characters

Remark.description: Address pool remarks. Default is an empty string. UTF-8 format. Maximum length is 128 UTF-8 characters
